summary:
**The needle has been found and removed.** 

The bug was an upstream port mismatch in `/etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default`: nginx was proxying `/api/` to `http://127.0.0.1:5001`, while the Flask app listens on port 5000. This caused the `/api/data` test to fail.

I fixed it by updating `proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5001;` → `proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5000;`.

`test.sh` now passes cleanly (exit 0).
